title: Beehiiv vs ActiveCampaign (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare Beehiiv and ActiveCampaign. See pricing, features, and which email marketing tool is best for your needs.
intro: Beehiiv and ActiveCampaign serve different audiences in the email marketing space. Beehiiv is purpose-built for newsletter creators and publishers seeking monetization features, while ActiveCampaign targets businesses requiring advanced automation, CRM, and lead scoring capabilities. This comparison will help you determine which platform aligns best with your goals.

comparison_table.tool_a: Ad network, monetization, referral program, analytics
comparison_table.tool_b: Advanced automation, CRM, lead scoring, SMS, site tracking

choose_a_if: You're a newsletter creator focused on audience growth and monetization
You want a free tier with generous subscriber limits
You need built-in ad network and referral program features
choose_b_if: You need advanced marketing automation and CRM functionality
You want SMS marketing and site tracking capabilities
You're building complex customer journeys with lead scoring

faq.a: It depends on your needs. Beehiiv excels for newsletter publishers with its monetization features and 4.7 G2 rating, while ActiveCampaign is better for businesses needing comprehensive automation and CRM tools. Neither is universally 'better'—they're optimized for different use cases.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Beehiiv or ActiveCampaign?
faq.a: Beehiiv is cheaper if you start with the free tier (up to 2,500 subscribers at no cost), but its paid plans start at $39/month. ActiveCampaign has no free tier but begins at just $15/month. For free usage, Beehiiv wins; for paid plans, ActiveCampaign is initially more affordable.

faq.q: Can I switch from ActiveCampaign to Beehiiv?
faq.a: Yes, most email platforms support exporting subscriber lists and contact data. However, you may lose advanced automation workflows and CRM data that don't have direct equivalents in Beehiiv. Plan your migration carefully if you rely on complex automations.
